sections.paragraph:
μεϑίστημι/μεϑιστάνω [μετά, ἵστημι]

—1. ‘cause to move from’

—a. a place 1 Cor 13:2.

—b. a responsible position dismiss, remove Lk 16:4; Ac 13:22.

—c. a situation, w. context indicating a new situation transfer Col 1:13.

—2. ‘cause to turn to a dif-ferent way of thinking’, w. context indicating pejorative aspect mislead Ac 19:26.
